response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds experience requirements with 13+ years of full-stack development and an MIT CS degree. Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, directly addressing a key requirement. Strong fundamentals in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes demonstrate core competency. Main gaps are specific frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest) and languages (Kotlin, Python) that are learnable for someone with this architecture discipline and testing-first mindset.
strengths: Directly experienced with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development at current role (re:cinq)
Exceeds experience requirement with 13+ years and MIT CS degree; demonstrated architecture and engineering discipline through TDD culture and open-source projects
Comprehensive full-stack depth across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with proven scaling to millions of requests/mails
concerns: Key framework gaps: Nest.js and Vitest not mentioned despite being primary stack requirements; may require ramp-up time
Secondary languages (Kotlin, Python) and PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned; testing framework specifics (Jest, Playwright) absent from resume
Recently started at re:cinq (April 2025, ~2 months tenure); earlier career shows pattern of 1-3 year tenures before recent stability

key_factors.factor: AI agent infrastructure & MCP development experience
Full-stack depth across multiple platforms with scaling experience
Framework gaps (Nest.js, Vitest) and secondary languages (Kotlin, Python)
